---
title: "Posit AI Demo"
author: "Max Kuhn"
institute: "Posit PBC"
---

# Sides + sources on github: <br> `topepo/Posit-AI-Demo`  {background-color="#B25D91FF"}

```{r}
#| label: pkgs
#| results: hide
#| echo: false

library(tidymodels)
```

## Posit AI









# Thanks for listening! {background-color="#FAE093FF"}
